backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that exposes a `transform` query callback for HTTP outcalls and a `proxyUrl` shared function that acts as a generic HTTP GET proxy, delegating to the `OutCall` module.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three frontend feature IDs (useProxyRequest update, ProxyContent iframe rendering, BrowserLayout loading/error states) to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, hooks, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes using OKLCH color values, applied globally to borders and body background/foreground.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Study Tools' with a neutral educational meta description, a noindex/nofollow robots tag, and a module script loading the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders `BrowserLayout` alongside a dark-themed Sonner `Toaster` with custom cheetah-style background and border colors.
frontend/src/components/AddressBar.tsx: Smart address bar component that syncs to the active tab's URL, detects search vs. URL input to show contextual icons, and submits navigation on Enter or arrow button click while resetting cleanly on blur.
frontend/src/components/BrowserLayout.ts: Main browser chrome component orchestrating tab management, proxy navigation, and search; it consumes structured `ProxyResponse` objects from `useProxyRequest`, extracts titles from HTML, and renders tab content, search results, or a games page accordingly.
frontend/src/components/CloakButton.tsx: Falcon cloak button with a dropdown mode selector (about:blank, https://error, 123456789101112) that persists the selected mode in local state and triggers the `useCloaking` hook on click, styled with the cheetah dark/orange theme.
frontend/src/components/ClockWidget.tsx: A React component that displays a live digital clock (HH:MM:SS) and short date, updating every second via setInterval.
frontend/src/components/GamesPage.tsx: A page component that renders a grid of game site cards (Math Playground, Hood Math, Unblocked Games) with thumbnails and tags, navigating to each site via a provided onNavigate callback.
frontend/src/components/ProxyContent.tsx: Renders proxied web content inside an iframe using srcdoc, preprocessing HTML to rewrite relative URLs, strip CSP meta tags, and inject a navigation interceptor script that posts messages to the parent for link/form navigation.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Displays a list of Google Custom Search results with title, URL, and snippet, allowing users to navigate to a result via a click handler.
frontend/src/components/TabBar.tsx: A browser-style tab bar component that renders switchable, closeable tabs with a loading indicator and a button to add new tabs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCloaking.ts: A hook that provides a cloak function to open the current app in a new popup window disguised as about:blank, an error page, or a numeric URL to obscure its true origin.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides two React Query mutation hooks: `useProxyRequest` proxies a URL via the backend actor and detects content type (HTML, image, plain text), and `useSearchRequest` fetches and parses DuckDuckGo HTML search results into a structured response.
frontend/src/hooks/useTabManager.ts: Defines the `TabState` interface and `useTabManager` hook, managing an array of browser tabs with operations to add, close, switch, and update tabs along with tracking the active tab.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, applies Tailwind directives, and defines a dark 'Cheetah' theme using OKLCH CSS custom properties along with utility classes for glows and custom scrollbars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrappers around the root `App` component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors (including Cheetah brand palette), Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, border radii, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the 'Cheetah Browser' web proxy project at schema version 1.0.0, listing existing implemented features and pending architectural requests for backend HTTP outcall proxying and frontend rendering upgrades.
